device.comment: Read only, single file. Must be in root directory.

sport.comment: Read/write, multiple files, file number = sport type. Directory=Sports

weight.comment: Read only, single file. Circular buffer. All message definitions at start of file. Directory=Weight

monitoring_a.comment: Read only. Directory=Monitoring. File number=sub type.

mfg_range_min.comment: 0xF7 - 0xFE reserved for manufacturer specific file types

mfg_range_max.comment: 0xF7 - 0xFE reserved for manufacturer specific file types

hsa_wrist_temperature_data.comment: Message number for the HSA wrist temperature data message

clear.comment: Allows clear of checksum for flash memory where can only write 1 to 0 without erasing sector.

ok.comment: Set to mark checksum as valid if computes to invalid values 0 or 0xFF. Checksum can also be set to ok to save encoding computation time.

min.comment: if date_time is < 0x10000000 then it is system time (seconds from device power on)

local_date_time.comment: seconds since 00:00 Dec 31 1989 in local time zone

min.comment: if date_time is < 0x10000000 then it is system time (seconds from device power on)

creator.comment: Creator of the file is always device index 0.

language_bits_0.comment: Bit field corresponding to language enum type (1 << language).

shooting.comment: Sport Shooting bits, set here for sport_bits alignment

grinding.comment: Sailing position, operating manual winches to power boat controls

all.comment: All is for goals only to include all sports.

sport_bits_0.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << sport).

sport_bits_1.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << (sport-8)).

sport_bits_2.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << (sport-16)).

sport_bits_3.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << (sport-24)).

sport_bits_4.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << (sport-32)).

sport_bits_5.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << (sport-40)).

sport_bits_6.comment: Bit field corresponding to sport enum type (1 << (sport-48)).

obstacle.comment: Used for events where participants run, crawl through mud, climb over walls, etc.

indoor_grinding.comment: Sailing position, operating manual winches to power boat controls

auto_multi_sport.comment: Auto multi-sport feature is enabled and user pressed lap button to advance session.

fitness_equipment.comment: Auto sport change caused by user linking to fitness equipment.

hour24.comment: Does not use a leading zero and has a colon

military.comment: Uses a leading zero and does not have a colon

workout_step.comment: Start at beginning of workout. Stop at end of each step.

session.comment: Stop at end of each session.

lap.comment: Stop at end of each lap.

virtual_partner_pace.comment: Group 1. Start at beginning of activity if VP enabled, when VP pace is changed during activity or VP enabled mid activity. stop_disable when VP disabled.

hr_high_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

hr_low_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

speed_high_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

speed_low_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

cad_high_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

cad_low_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

power_high_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

power_low_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

time_duration_alert.comment: Group 1. Start if enabled mid activity (not required at start of activity). Stop when duration is reached. stop_disable if disabled.

distance_duration_alert.comment: Group 1. Start if enabled mid activity (not required at start of activity). Stop when duration is reached. stop_disable if disabled.

calorie_duration_alert.comment: Group 1. Start if enabled mid activity (not required at start of activity). Stop when duration is reached. stop_disable if disabled.

activity.comment: Group 1.. Stop at end of activity.

length.comment: Stop at end of each length.

elev_high_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

elev_low_alert.comment: Group 0. Start / stop when in alert condition.

tank_pod_disconnected.comment: marker - tank pod has lost connection

garmin_fr405_antfs.comment: Do not use. Used by FR405 for ANTFS man id.

hrm_run_single_byte_product_id.comment: hrm_run model for HRM ANT+ messaging

axs01.comment: AXS01 HRM Bike Chipset model for ANT+ messaging

hrm_tri_single_byte_product_id.comment: hrm_tri model for HRM ANT+ messaging

hrm4_run_single_byte_product_id.comment: hrm4 run model for HRM ANT+ messaging

fr225_single_byte_product_id.comment: fr225 model for HRM ANT+ messaging

gen3_bsm_single_byte_product_id.comment: gen3_bsm model for Bike Speed ANT+ messaging

gen3_bcm_single_byte_product_id.comment: gen3_bcm model for Bike Cadence ANT+ messaging

OHR.comment: Garmin Wearable Optical Heart Rate Sensor for ANT+ HR Profile Broadcasting

tcx.comment: For backwards compatibility. Watch should add missing id fields then clear flag.

speed.comment: Speed source required for workout step.

heart_rate.comment: Heart rate source required for workout step.

distance.comment: Distance source required for workout step.

cadence.comment: Cadence source required for workout step.

power.comment: Power source required for workout step.

grade.comment: Grade source required for workout step.

resistance.comment: Resistance source required for workout step.

aviation.comment: Denote course files to be used as flight plans

workout_hr.comment: 0 - 100 indicates% of max hr; >100 indicates bpm (255 max) plus 100

workout_power.comment: 0 - 1000 indicates % of functional threshold power; >1000 indicates watts plus 1000.

im.comment: IM is a mixed interval containing the same number of lengths for each of: Butterfly, Backstroke, Breaststroke, Freestyle, swam in that order.

im_by_round.comment: For repeated workout steps, a new individual medly stroke is used for each round.

all.comment: All is for goals only to include all sports.

right.comment: data corresponds to right if set, otherwise unknown
data corresponds to right if set, otherwise unknown

idle.comment: Rest period. Length with no strokes

device_initiates_sync.comment: Indicates device is in control of initiating all syncs

connect_iq_app_managment.comment: Device supports delete and reorder of apps via GCM

wifi_verification.comment: Device supports reporting wifi verification via GCM

time_into_day.comment: number of seconds into the day since 00:00:00 UTC

localtime_into_day.comment: number of seconds into the day since local 00:00:00

other.comment: stroke was detected but cannot be identified

connected_gps.comment: GPS that is provided over a proprietary bluetooth service

auto.comment: automatic if the device supports it

video_split.comment: Mark of video file split (end of one file, beginning of the other)

video_split_start.comment: Mark of video file split start

video_pause.comment: Mark when a video recording has been paused

video_resume.comment: Mark when a video recording has been resumed

pairing_timeout.comment: Timeout pairing to previously paired device

connection_timeout.comment: Connection closed due to extended bad communications

dynamic.comment: The EXD may display the configured concepts in any layout it sees fit.

cardio_sensors.comment: Exercises within workouts that use GPS/sensors rather than rep counting

deco_stop_cleared.comment: a deco stop has been cleared

depth.comment: Alarm when a certain depth is crossed

time.comment: Alarm when a certain time has transpired

speed.comment: Alarm when a certain ascent or descent rate is exceeded

transition.comment: Marks the time going from ascent_split to descent_split/used in backcountry ski

standard.comment: Standard Diver Alert Network no-fly guidance
